value_chain_position: Connectivity silicon for AI clusters (CXL/PCIe smart cable modules, retimers, AEC ASICs) — the low-latency interconnect fabric linking GPUs within racks and between racks.
relative_comps: Astera Labs is a rare pure-play on AI cluster connectivity; its ARIES PCIe/CXL retimers and LEO smart-cable modules are designed into NVDA HGX H100/H200 and GB200 reference platforms. Revenue doubled YoY (+104%) and its FCF margin of 34% is exceptional for its growth stage. Marvell and AVGO sell competing DSP/retimer chips but are broader companies where connectivity is one product line among many — Astera is the focused specialist. Trades at a premium (~80-100x forward earnings) reflecting its clean AI-native positioning and hyperscaler design-win momentum.
